title: Company Profile
content: Digital Ready Ghana helps businesses grow through social media management, web development, digital advertising, branding, content creation, motion graphics, SEO, and marketing consultation.

title: Social Media Management
content: Packages include content planning, posting, community management, and monthly analytics. Custom quotes based on platforms and posting frequency.

title: Website Development
content: Business websites, e-commerce, landing pages. Timeline typically 2–8 weeks depending on scope.

title: Pricing FAQ
content: All pricing is customized after discovery. We do not publish fixed rates online. Book a free consultation for a tailored quote.

title: Objection: Too expensive
content: Emphasize ROI, phased delivery, and measurable outcomes. Offer starter packages and a discovery call.
